title: ENSET Challenge Hackathon

title: AI Portfolio Bootcamp

title: UX Research Challenge
description: Create a small UX case study from user interviews to prototype.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals Lab
description: Practice cybersecurity basics in a safe lab environment.

title: Digital Campaign Sprint
description: Plan, publish, and measure a small campaign for a student club or local project.

title: Brand Identity Portfolio Challenge
description: Create a compact brand identity system with logo, colors, typography, and social assets.

title: Student Media Production Project
description: Produce a short educational or social-impact video with planning, editing, and publishing.

title: Business Case Competition
description: Analyze a business problem, propose a solution, and present a structured recommendation.

title: Project Coordinator Internship
description: Support planning, coordination, reporting, and follow-up for a real team project.

title: EdTech Micro-Lesson Challenge
description: Design and test a short digital lesson that helps students understand one difficult concept.

title: HR Talent Workshop Assistant

title: Industrial Process Improvement Case
description: Analyze a workflow, identify waste or bottlenecks, and propose measurable improvements.

title: Embedded IoT Mini Project
description: Build a small connected device using sensors, microcontroller code, and simple documentation.

title: Startup Validation Sprint
description: Validate a problem, interview users, sketch an MVP, and pitch a practical next step.

title: Web Portfolio Build Week
description: Build and publish a clean personal portfolio with one real project case study.

title: Operations Analytics Internship
description: Support operational reporting, spreadsheet analysis, and improvement tracking.
